cards.name: High-Speed Chase
abilities: Draw two cards, then discard a card.

cards.name: Diving Catch
abilities: When a card effect causes you to discard this card, rescue a Bystander and draw two cards.

cards.name: Drop off a Friend
abilities: You may discard a card. You get +[icon:attack] equal to that card's [icon:vp].

cards.name: Strength of Spirit
abilities: Discard any number of cards. Draw that many cards.

cards.name: Whatever the Cost
abilities: Draw a card.
[hc:covert]: You may KO a card from your hand or discard pile.

cards.name: Absorb Energies
abilities: Whenever a card you own is KO'd this turn, you get +2[icon:recruit].

cards.name: Concussive Blast
abilities: [hc:ranged][hc:ranged]: You get +3[icon:attack].

cards.name: Firepower from the Future
abilities: Discard the top four cards of your deck. You get +[icon:attack] equal to those cards' printed [icon:attack].
[team:x-men]: KO any number of those cards.

cards.name: Stalk the Prey
abilities: You may move a Villain to an adjacent city space. If another Villain is already there, swap them.

cards.name: Night Hunter
abilities: Whenever you defeat a Villain in the Sewers or Rooftops this turn, you get +2[icon:recruit].

cards.name: Nowhere to Hide
abilities: Whenever you defeat a Villain in the Sewers or Rooftops this turn, draw two cards.

cards.name: Vampiric Surge
abilities: You get +1[icon:attack] for each Villain in your Victory Pile.

cards.name: Disaster Survivalist
abilities: When a Master Strike is played, before it takes effect, you may discard this card. If you do, draw three extra cards at the end of this turn.

cards.name: Strike at the Heart of Evil
cards.displayName: Strike at the Heart of Evil
abilities: You get +2[icon:attack] only when fighting Masterminds.

cards.name: Rapid Response Force
abilities: [keyword:Teleport]
[team:x-force]: You get +1[icon:attack] for each other [team:x-force] Hero you played this turn.

cards.name: Army of One
abilities: KO any number of cards from your hand. You get +1[icon:attack] for each card KO'd this way.

cards.name: Draw Their Fire
abilities: You gain a Wound.

cards.name: Invulnerability
abilities: If you would gain a Wound, you may discard this card instead. If you do, draw two cards.

cards.name: Silent Statue
abilities: [hc:strength]: You get +2[icon:attack].

cards.name: Russian Heavy Tank
abilities: If another player would gain a Wound, you may reveal this card to gain that Wound and draw a card.

cards.name: Backflip
abilities: When you play Backflip, the next Hero you recruit this turn goes on top of your deck.

cards.name: Radar Sense
abilities: Choose a number, then reveal the top card of your deck. If the card is that [icon:vp], you get +2[icon:attack].

cards.name: Blind Justice
abilities: Choose a number, then reveal the top card of your deck. If the card is that [icon:vp], draw it.

cards.name: The Man Without Fear
abilities: Choose a number, then reveal the top card of your deck. If the card is that [icon:vp], draw it and repeat this process.

abilities: Draw a card.
[team:x-force]: [keyword:Versatile 1]

cards.name: Ready for Anything
abilities: [keyword:Versatile 2]

cards.name: Specialized Ammunition
abilities: You may discard a card from your hand. If that card had a [icon:recruit] icon, you get +4[icon:recruit]. If that card had an [icon:attack] icon, you get +4[icon:attack].

cards.name: Against All Odds
abilities: [keyword:Versatile 5]
[team:x-force]: This card and each other Versatile ability you use for the rest of this turn produces both [icon:recruit] and [icon:attack].

cards.name: First Strike
abilities: If this is the first card you played this turn, you get +1[icon:attack].

cards.name: Ninjitsu
abilities: Draw a card.
[hc:covert]: You get +2[icon:recruit].

cards.name: Sai Blades
abilities: You get +1[icon:attack] for each Hero you played this turn that costs 1[icon:vp] or 2[icon:vp].

cards.name: Silent Meditation
abilities: When you play Silent Meditation, the next Hero you recruit this turn goes into your hand.
[team:marvel-knights]: You get +2[icon:recruit].

cards.name: Dirty Work
abilities: [hc:tech]: Any Villain you fight in the Sewers this turn gets -2[icon:attack].

abilities: [keyword:Versatile 3]

abilities: Draw a card.
[hc:strength]: Defeat a Villain of 3[icon:attack] or less for free.

cards.name: Hell on Wheels

abilities: You may KO a Villain from your Victory Pile. If you do, you get +3[icon:attack].

cards.name: Penance Stare
abilities: Each player KOs a Villain from their Victory Pile. You get +1[icon:attack] for each Villain KO'd this way.
[team:marvel-knights]: Put one of those Villains into your Victory Pile.

cards.name: Deep Freeze
abilities: Draw a card.
[hc:ranged]: You get +1[icon:recruit] for each other [hc:ranged] Hero you played this turn.

abilities: [hc:ranged]: You get +1[icon:attack] for each other [hc:ranged] Hero you played this turn.

cards.name: Frost Spike Armor
abilities: [hc:ranged]: Draw a card for each [hc:ranged] Hero you played this turn.

cards.name: Impenetrable Ice Wall
abilities: If a Villain, Master Strike, or Mastermind Tactic would cause you to gain any Wounds or discard any cards, you may reveal this card instead.

abilities: You get +1[icon:recruit] for each Hero with a different [icon:vp] you have.

abilities: You get +1[icon:attack] for each Hero with a different [icon:vp] you have.

abilities: [team:x-men]: Rescue a Bystander. [keyword:rescue:1]

abilities: Whenever you rescue a Bystander this turn, you get +1[icon:attack].
[team:x-men]: Rescue a Bystander for each other [team:x-men] Hero you played this turn.

abilities: [keyword:Teleport]
When you play or [keyword:Teleport] this card, you may also [keyword:Teleport] up to three other cards from your hand.

cards.name: Class Dismissed
abilities: You may put a Hero from the HQ on the bottom of the Hero Deck.
[hc:instinct]: You may KO a card from your hand or discard pile.

cards.name: Telepathic Probe
abilities: Reveal the top card of the Villain Deck. If it's a Bystander, you may rescue it. If it's a Villain, you may fight it this turn.

cards.name: Mind Control
abilities: Whenever you defeat a Villain this turn, you may gain it. It becomes a grey Hero with no text that gives +[icon:attack] equal to its [icon:attack]. ( You still get its [icon:piercing].)

cards.name: Boom Goes the Dynamite
abilities: Reveal the top card of your deck. If it costs 0[icon:vp], KO it.
[hc:tech]: Draw a card.

cards.name: Hostile Interrogation
abilities: [hc:strength]: Each other player reveals the top card of their deck. If that card costs 4[icon:vp] or more, discard it. You get +1[icon:recruit] for each card discarded this way.

cards.name: Hail of Bullets
abilities: Reveal the top card of the Villain Deck. If it's a Villain, you get +[icon:attack] equal to its printed [icon:piercing].
[hc:tech][hc:tech]: You may defeat that Villain for free.

cards.name: The Punisher
abilities: Reveal cards from the Hero Deck until you have revealed two cards with the same [icon:vp]. You get +1[icon:attack] for each card revealed this way. Put them on the bottom of the Hero Deck in random order.

cards.name: Animal Instincts
abilities: Draw a card.
[hc:instinct]: You get +2[icon:attack].

abilities: If you drew any extra cards this turn, you get +2[icon:attack].

cards.name: No Mercy
abilities: Draw a card.
You may KO a card from your hand or discard pile.

cards.name: Reckless Abandon
abilities: Count the number of extra cards you drew this turn. Draw that many cards.

cards.name: Apocalypse
abilities: Always Leads: Four Horsemen
Four Horsemen Villains get +2[icon:attack].
Apocalypse Wins: When Famine, Pestilence, War, and Death have escaped.
Master Strike: Each player reveals their hand and puts all their Heroes that cost 1[icon:vp] or more on top of their deck.

cards.name: Apocalyptic Destruction
abilities: Fight: Each other player KOs two Heroes from their discard pile that each cost 1[icon:vp] or more.

cards.name: The End of All Things
abilities: Fight: Each other player reveals the top three cards of their deck, KOs each one of those cards that cost 1 [icon:vp] or more, and puts the rest back in any order.

cards.name: Horsemen Are Drawing Nearer
abilities: Fight: Each other player plays a Four Horsemen Villain from their Victory Pile as if playing it from the Villain Deck.

cards.name: Immortal and Undefeated
abilities: Fight: If this is not the final Tactic, rescue six Bystanders and shuffle this Tactic back into the other Tactics.

cards.name: Kingpin
abilities: [keyword:Bribe]
Always Leads: Streets of New York
Master Strike: Each player reveals a [team:marvel-knights] Hero or discards their hand and draws 5 cards.

cards.name: Call a Hit
abilities: Fight: Choose a Hero from each player's discard pile and KO it.

cards.name: Criminal Empire
abilities: Fight: If this is not the final Tactic, reveal the top three cards of the Villain Deck. Play all the Villains you revealed. Put the rest back in random order.

cards.name: Dirty Cops
abilities: Fight: Put a 0 [icon:vp] Hero from the KO pile on top of each other player's deck.

cards.name: Mob War
abilities: Fight: Each other player plays a Henchman Villain from their Victory Pile as if playing it from the Villain Deck.

cards.name: Mephisto
abilities: Whenever a player gains a Wound, put it on top of that player's deck.
Always Leads: Underworld
Master Strike: Each player reveals a [team:marvel-knights] Hero or gains a Wound.

cards.name: Damned If You Do...
abilities: Fight: Each other player KOs a Bystander from their Victory Pile or gains a Wound.

cards.name: Devilish Torment
abilities: Fight: Each other player puts all 0 [icon:vp] cards from their discard pile on top of their deck in any order.

cards.name: Pain Begets Pain
abilities: Fight: Choose any number of Wounds from your hand and discard pile. The player to your right gains them.

cards.name: The Price of Failure
abilities: Fight: Each other player without a Mastermind Tactic in their Victory Pile gains a Wound.

cards.name: Mr. Sinister
abilities: Mr. Sinister gets +1[icon:attack] for each Bystander he has.
Always Leads: Marauders
Master Strike: Mr. Sinister captures a Bystander. Then each player with exactly 6 cards reveals a [hc:covert] Hero or discards cards equal to the number of Bystanders Mr. Sinister has.

cards.name: Human Experimentation
abilities: Fight: Mr. Sinister captures Bystanders equal to the number of Villains in the city.

cards.name: Master Geneticist
abilities: Fight: Reveal the top seven cards of the Villain Deck. Mr. Sinister captures all of the Bystanders you revealed. Put the rest back in random order.

cards.name: Plans Within Plans
abilities: Fight: Mr. Sinister captures a Bystander for each Mr. Sinister Tactic in players' Victory Piles, including this Tactic.

cards.name: Telepathic Manipulation
abilities: Fight: Mr. Sinister captures a Bystander from each other player's Victory Pile.

cards.name: Stryfe
abilities: Always Leads: MLF
Master Strike: Stack this Master Strike next to Stryfe. Stryfe gets +1[icon:attack] for each Master Strike stacked next to him. Each player reveals a [team:x-force] Hero or discards a card at random.

cards.name: Furious Wrath
abilities: Fight: Reveal the top six cards of the Villain Deck. Play all the Master Strikes you revealed. Put the rest back in random order.

cards.name: Psychic Torment
abilities: Fight: Look at the top five cards of your deck. Put one into your hand and discard the rest.

cards.name: Swift Vengeance
abilities: Fight: A Wound from the Wound Stack becomes a Master Strike that takes effect immediately.

cards.name: Tide of Retribution
abilities: Fight: Each other player reveals an [team:x-force] Hero or gains a Wound.

cards.name: Egghead
abilities: Ambush: Reveal the top card of the Villain Deck. If it's a Villain, play it.

cards.name: Electro
abilities: Ambush: Reveal the top card of the Villain Deck. If it's a Scheme Twist, play it.

cards.name: Gladiator
abilities: Ambush: Reveal the top card of the Villain Deck. If it's a Bystander, Gladiator captures it.

cards.name: Rhino
abilities: Ambush: Reveal the top card of the Villain Deck. If it's a Master Strike, each player gains a Wound.
Escape: Each player gains a Wound. [effect:gainWoundEachPlayer]

cards.name: Death
abilities: Fight: Each other player reveals their hand and KOs one of their Heroes that costs 1[icon:vp] or more.
Escape: Each player does that same effect.

cards.name: Famine
abilities: Fight: Each other player reveals an [hc:instinct] Hero or discards a card.
Escape: Each player does that same effect.

cards.name: Pestilence
abilities: Fight: Each other player reveals the top three cards of their deck, discards each of those cards that costs 1[icon:vp] or more, and puts the rest back in any order.
Escape: Each player does that same effect.

cards.name: War
abilities: Fight: Each other player reveals an [hc:instinct] Hero or gains a Wound.
Escape: Each player does that same effect.

cards.name: Blockbuster
abilities: Blockbuster gets +2[icon:attack] for each Bystander he has.
Ambush: If there is a Villain in the Bank that Villain and Blockbuster each capture a Bystander.

cards.name: Chimera
abilities: Chimera gets +3[icon:attack] for each Bystander she has.
Ambush: Reveal the top three cards of the Villain Deck. Chimera captures all the Bystander cards you revealed. Put the rest back in random order.

cards.name: Scalphunter
abilities: Scalphunter gets +1[icon:attack] for each Bystander he has.
Ambush: Each player chooses a Bystander from their Victory Pile. Scalphunter captures those Bystanders.

cards.name: Vertigo
abilities: Fight: Each player discards all the cards in their hand, then draws as many cards as they discarded.

cards.name: Forearm
abilities: To fight Forearm, you must also reveal four Hero cards with different card names.

cards.name: Reignfire
abilities: Escape: Reignfire becomes a Master Strike that takes effect immediately.

cards.name: Wildside
abilities: Fight: If you fight Wildside in the Sewers or Bank, KO two of your Heroes.

cards.name: Zero
abilities: To fight Zero, you must also discard three cards that cost 0[icon:vp].

cards.name: Bullseye
abilities: Fight: KO one of your Heroes with a [icon:recruit] icon and one of your Heroes with an [icon:attack] icon.

cards.name: Hammerhead
abilities: [keyword:Bribe]
Fight: KO one of your Heroes with a [icon:recruit] icon.

cards.name: Jigsaw
abilities: Ambush: Each player discards three cards, then draws two cards.
[keyword:Bribe]

cards.name: Tombstone
abilities: [keyword:Bribe]
Escape: Each player reveals a [hc:strength] Hero or gains a Wound.

cards.name: Azazel
abilities: Fight: A card in your hand gains [keyword:Teleport] this turn.

cards.name: Blackheart
abilities: Ambush: The player to your right reveals a [team:marvel-knights] Hero or gains a Wound.
Fight: Same effect.
Escape: Same effect.

cards.name: Dracula
abilities: Ambush: Dracula captures the top card of the Hero Deck. Dracula gets +[icon:attack] equal to that card's Cost.
Fight: Gain that card.

cards.name: Lilith, Daughter of Dracula
abilities: Escape: Each player without Dracula in their Victory Pile gains a Wound.

henchmen.name: Maggia Goons
abilities: [keyword:Bribe]
Fight: KO one of your Heroes. [effect:koHeroCurrentPlayer]

henchmen.name: Phalanx
abilities: Fight: Reveal a [hc:tech] Hero or KO one of your Heroes with a [icon:attack] icon.
Setup: 8 Twists. Put a token on this Scheme to represent the baby, Hope Summers.
Twist: If a Villain has the baby, that Villain escapes. Otherwise, the baby is captured by the closest Villain to the Villain Deck. (If there are no Villains, do nothing.)

Special Rules: The Villain with the baby gets +4[icon:attack]. If you defeat that Villain, rescue the baby to your Victory Pile (until the next Twist). The baby is worth +6[icon:piercing] at the end of the game. If a Villain escapes with the baby, stack a Twist next to the Mastermind and return the baby to this Scheme card.
Evil Wins: When there are 3 Twists stacked next to the Mastermind.
Setup: 8 Twists. 6 Heroes in the Hero Deck.

Special Rules: Whenever a Hero is KO'd from the HQ, turn that Hero face down on that HQ space, representing an Explosion on the Helicarrier. When an HQ space has 6 Explosions, that space is Destroyed and can't hold Heroes anymore.
Twist: Stack this Twist next to the Scheme. Then for each Twist in that stack, KO the leftmost Hero in the HQ and immediately refill that space.
Evil Wins: When all HQ spaces are Destroyed or the Hero Deck runs out.
Setup: 8 Twists.
Twist: Each player reveals a [hc:strength] Hero or KOs the top card of their deck.
Evil Wins: When the number of non grey Heroes in the KO pile is 3 times the number of players.
Setup: 8 Twists. Include 10 Maggia Goons as one of the Henchman Groups.
Special Rules: Goons also have the ability “Ambush: Play another card from the Villain Deck.“
Twist: Each Goon in the city escapes. Shuffle all Goons from each players' Victory Piles into the Villain Deck.
Evil Wins: When 5 Goons escape.
Setup: 8 Twists. 24 Bystanders in the Hero Deck. (1 player: 12 Bystanders in the Hero Deck)
Special Rules: You may spend 2[icon:recruit] to rescue a Bystander from the HQ.
Twist: KO all Bystanders in the HQ. Then each player reveals an [hc:instinct] Hero or KOs a Bystander from their Victory Pile.
Evil Wins: When the number of Bystanders KO'd and/or carried off is 4 times the number of players.
Setup: 8 Twists representing Plutonium. Add an extra Villain Group.
Twist: This Plutonium is captured by the closest Villain to the Villain Deck. If there are no Villains in the city, KO this Plutonium. Either way, play another card from the Villain Deck.
Special Rules: Each Villain gets +1[icon:attack] for each Plutonium it has. When a Villain with any Plutonium is defeated, shuffle that Plutonium back into the Villain Deck.
Evil Wins: When 4 Plutonium have been carried off by Villains.
Setup: 8 Twists. Villain Deck includes 14 extra Jean Grey cards and no Bystanders.

Twist: Stack 5 Bystanders face down next to the Scheme. Bystanders stacked here are “Demon Goblin“ Villains. They have 2[icon:attack]. Players can fight these Demon Goblins to rescue them as Bystanders.

Special Rules: Each Jean Grey card counts as a “Goblin Queen“ Villain. It's worth 4[icon:piercing] . It has [icon:attack] equal to its [icon:vp] plus the number of Demon Goblins stacked next to the Scheme.
Evil Wins: When 4 Goblin Queen cards escape.
Setup: 8 Twists. Villain Deck includes 14 cards for an extra Hero and no Bystanders.

Special Rules: Whenever you play a Hero from the Villain Deck, that Hero is captured by the closest enemy to the Villain Deck. Each Villain gets +2[icon:attack] for each Hero it has. When you fight an enemy, gain all the Heroes captured by that enemy.
Twist: KO all Heroes captured by enemies. Then play another card from the Villain Deck.
Evil Wins: 9 non grey Heroes are KO'd or carried off.
When you rescue this Bystander, draw a card.
When you rescue this Bystander, you may KO a Wound from your hand or from any player's discard pile.
When you rescue this Bystander, you may KO one of your Heroes or a Hero from your discard pile.
